description_long: This is a modern, two-story house with a flat roof and a minimalist cubic design. The exterior features a mix of dark and light facades, with large rectangular windows arranged in a mostly symmetrical pattern. A spacious wooden deck surrounds the house, furnished with outdoor seating, a table with an umbrella, and lounge chairs, suggesting a comfortable outdoor living area. Several trees and shrubs are positioned around the property, adding greenery and shade. The main entryway is located on the lighter facade, accessible from the deck, and is accentuated by a simple, clean-lined door. The overall aesthetic is contemporary, with an emphasis on geometric forms and open, functional outdoor spaces.
description: A modern, two-story house with a flat roof, large windows, and a spacious wooden deck with outdoor furniture and surrounding trees. The design is minimalist and geometric, featuring both dark and light exterior facades.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entry, large windows, and a deck with outdoor furniture and a tree nearby.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the flat roof, minimal windows, and the deck extending to the left with a tree in the foreground.
description_view_2: Opposite front view with a clear look at the light facade, main entry, and symmetrical window arrangement, plus deck and trees.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the dark facade, back door, deck with umbrella table, and a tree to the right.
attribute_entryway_design: Simple main door on the deck, no steps, no porch, minimal overhang, clean lines
